pytorch.reason: Tensor representation for rotor coefficients and e3nn equivariance verification; torch.allclose used to confirm equivariance tolerance

pyg.reason: graph message-passing not required for rotor algebra probe

z3.reason: SMT UNSAT proof that no assignment of encoded rotor coefficients can simultaneously satisfy A*B == B*A and the non-identity constraint; UNSAT is the primary structural-impossibility proof form

cvc5.reason: z3 covers the UNSAT requirement; cvc5 not needed for this probe

sympy.reason: Symbolic BCH commutator [A,B] = AB - BA computed in the Clifford algebra basis; non-zero symbolic result confirms non-commutativity independently of numeric floating-point values

clifford.reason: Cl(3) multivector rotor arithmetic: A*B and B*A computed as genuine geometric-algebra products; commutator norm directly measures non-commutativity in the multivector space

geomstats.reason: Riemannian manifold machinery not needed; Cl(3) handles the geometry

e3nn.reason: SO(3) equivariance check: rotate input rotors via e3nn D-matrices, then commute; must equal commute-then-rotate within 1e-5 tolerance, confirming the commutator transforms as a proper SO(3) tensor

rustworkx.reason: no graph structure needed for this algebra probe

xgi.reason: hypergraph not needed; pairwise rotor commutators only

toponetx.reason: cell-complex topology not required for G-tower algebra

gudhi.reason: persistent homology not required for this commutator probe

ribs.reason: GridArchive stores (G-depth, commutator-norm) quality-diversity cells; archive occupancy confirms that non-commutativity varies meaningfully across the rotor pair space, not just at a single point

optuna.reason: TPE sampler searches the 4D rotor parameter space to find the maximally non-commutative pair; objective is commutator norm; best trial value used as evidence that optima exist above threshold

pos_a_clifford_noncommutative.note: Cl(3) rotor A*B - B*A must have nonzero norm for generic rotors

pos_b_sympy_bch_nonzero.note: Symbolic BCH leading commutator [e12, e23] coefficient must be nonzero

pos_c_z3_unsat_commutativity.note: UNSAT confirms no unit non-trivial rotors in e12/e23 planes can commute

pos_d_e3nn_equivariance.note: Commutator must transform equivariantly under SO(3) rotation (via e3nn matrix)

pos_e_ribs_archive_populated.note: Archive must contain > 1 distinct (depth, norm) elite to confirm coverage

pos_f_optuna_tpe_finds_maximum.note: TPE must find a pair with commutator norm exceeding target within 30 trials

neg_a_identity_commutes.note: A * I - I * A must be zero for identity rotor

neg_b_z3_sat_for_identity.note: Identity case must be SAT (commuting) — confirms UNSAT in positive is specific to non-identity

neg_c_ribs_identity_zero_norm.note: Identity pair has commutator norm ~0; confirms archive is sensitive to actual non-commutativity

boundary_a_near_identity_continuous.note: Commutator norm must grow monotonically from near-zero as angle increases

boundary_b_same_vs_diff_axis.note: Same-axis rotors must commute (norm~0); different-axis must not (norm>0.5)
